---
title: ""
# image: assets/images/profile-pic.jpg
# image-alt: "Mohamed Bakr profile photo"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohdbakr/
    - icon: github
      aria-label: "GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/Mohdbakr
    - icon: globe
      aria-label: "Portfolio"
      href: https://portfolio.mohdbakr.com
page-layout: full
---

coming soon...
